endpoints.name: GET /v1/{name}
endpoints.description: Returns an execution of the given name.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: POST /v1/{name}:cancel
endpoints.description: Cancels an execution of the given name.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: GET /v1/{parent}/executions
endpoints.description: Returns a list of executions which belong to the workflow with the given name. The method returns executions of all workflow revisions. Returned executions are ordered by their start time (newest first).
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: POST /v1/{parent}/executions
endpoints.description: Creates a new execution using the latest revision of the given workflow.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: POST /v1/{workflow}:triggerPubsubExecution
endpoints.description: Triggers a new execution using the latest revision of the given workflow by a Pub/Sub push notification.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{WORKFLOW}} with a real workflow.
